title: Specifications
subtitle: Client-facing specification sheets generated from saved formulation versions.
no_sheets_hint: Open a formulation, save a version, then generate a sheet from it.
row_count: {count, plural, =0 {No sheets} one {# sheet} other {# sheets}} loaded

tab.subtitle: {count, plural, =0 {No client-facing sheets yet} one {# specification sheet} other {# specification sheets}} for this project.

document_kind.hint: Draft prints with a diagonal watermark; Final prints clean for the client.

create.title: New specification sheet
create.subtitle: Pick a saved formulation version and fill in the client context.
create.version_none: No saved versions yet — save one on the formulation first.
create.version_picker_hint: Only saved versions appear here. Catalogue edits after this point never rewrite the sheet.
create.client_picker_hint: Pick from your address book, or create a new customer. Their name, email and company get seeded into the sheet.

detail.delete_confirm: Delete this specification sheet? The underlying formulation version is not affected.

visibility.hint: Show, hide, or reorder any printable block. Use the arrows to change the order the customer sees.

edit_details.title: Edit specification details
edit_details.subtitle: Everything here appears on the customer-facing sheet. Fields shown in the formulation builder (total weight, servings per pack) are already snapshotted and aren't repeated here.
edit_details.margin_percent_hint: Target margin used to derive the quoted price. Leave blank if price is entered directly.
edit_details.final_price_hint: Per-pack price printed on the sheet. Leave blank to hide the commercial row until agreed.
edit_details.code_hint: Sheet reference printed in the header. Defaults to the project code when blank.
edit_details.client_company_hint: Company name on the client's copy of the sheet.
edit_details.client_name_hint: Primary contact person at the client.
edit_details.client_email_hint: Used for the public preview link — invite emails go to this address.
edit_details.weight_uniformity_hint: QC tolerance band for the per-unit weight test (e.g. 10% for consumer brands, ±5% for regulated channels). Falls back to the org default when blank.
edit_details.shelf_life_hint: Client-negotiated guaranteed shelf life (e.g. 24 months). Independent of the recipe — ambient vs chilled storage changes this.
edit_details.food_contact_status_hint: Regulatory declaration printed on the sheet (e.g. "EU 10/2011 compliant", "FDA 21 CFR 177 compliant").
edit_details.storage_conditions_hint: Statement printed on the pack (e.g. "Store in a cool dry place, below 25°C, protected from light").
edit_details.cover_notes_hint: Free-form paragraph printed above the signature block — use it for bespoke caveats or a cover letter.

signature.internal_subtitle: Draw your signature to advance the spec sheet. The image is stored on the audit trail and appears on the printed sheet and PDF.
signature.customer_subtitle: By signing you confirm acceptance of the specification as presented. Your name, email, and company were captured when you entered this preview.
signature.customer_title_bundled: Sign to accept the specification and proposal
signature.customer_subtitle_bundled: A single signature accepts both the technical specification and the commercial proposal shown above. Your name, email, and company were captured when you entered this preview.
signature.bundled_hint: Signing accepts the specification and the commercial proposal shown together on this page.
signature.accepted_banner: You accepted this specification as {name} on {when}.
signature.not_sent_yet: This specification hasn't been sent for acceptance yet. Ask the sender to move it to the Sent state.

packaging.title: Pick packaging components
packaging.subtitle: Search the packaging catalogue for each slot. Leave a slot blank to keep the TBD placeholder.

share.title: Share client preview link
share.subtitle: Anyone with this URL can view the spec sheet read-only — no login required. Rotate the link to invalidate the previous one, or revoke to disable sharing.
share.token_hint: Rotating issues a new URL and invalidates the old one.
share.not_shared: This sheet is private. Generate a link to share it with the client.

public.banner: You are viewing a shared specification sheet. Access can be revoked at any time by the sheet owner.
public.not_found_body: This sharing link is no longer active. Please contact the sheet owner for an updated link.
public.proposal_body: A single signature below accepts both the technical specification above and this commercial proposal.

signature.customer_hint: Sign below to confirm you've reviewed this specification.

sheet.title: Product Specification Sheet

sections.limits: Microbiological, PAH, Pesticides and Heavy Metal

allergens.count: {count, plural, one {# allergenic ingredient} other {# allergenic ingredients}}

sheet.pending_nutrition: Nutrition data pending catalogue fill — values shown as zero until every raw material has its nutrition columns populated.
sheet.nutrition_partial_hint: Based on {count} of {total} ingredients with catalogue data. Missing values contribute zero.

access_denied.title: Access denied
access_denied.body: Your membership does not grant access to specifications. Ask an owner for permission.
